_comment: Ready-to-splice n8n DataTable nodes for processed-message dedup. Node type n8n-nodes-base.dataTable, typeVersion 1.1 (verified on live 2.14.2). Replace PASTE_DATA_TABLE_ID_HERE with the real table id from the n8n UI, OR switch each dataTableId resourceLocator to mode 'name' with value 'processed_messages'. Parameter shapes were introspected from the live node binary (common/fields.js resourceLocator, common/selectMany.js filter fixedCollection, common/addRow.js resourceMapper, actions/table/create.operation.js).

__create_table__._comment: OPTIONAL one-shot node to CREATE the table from inside the live server (Manual Trigger -> this node -> Test workflow once, then delete the temp workflow). Do NOT run via 'n8n execute' (CLI does not init the data-table module).
__create_table__.name: Create processed_messages

dedup_gate._comment: READ GATE. Splice: Load Inbox Row.main[0] -> this -> Build Prompt. rowNotExists emits the item ONLY when no matching row exists; if already processed it emits nothing and the LLM/draft path is skipped. Values sourced from inbox_messages (Load Inbox Row).
dedup_gate.name: Dedup Gate

mark_processed._comment: WRITE. Splice: Insert Draft Stub.main[0] -> this -> Pack Draft Id. upsert keyed on account_id + provider_message_id (idempotent). account_id/message_id MUST come from Load Inbox Row (inbox_messages), NOT the draft stub (stub defaults account_id to placeholder 1).
mark_processed.name: Mark Processed

__connection_rewires__._comment: Apply these connection changes when splicing into MailBOX-Classify (names must match the existing node names).

__notes__: The 'dataTableId' resourceLocator real shape is { mode, value } (modes: list | name | id). The '__rt' key here is documentation only — when hand-editing the exported workflow JSON, write the object as {"mode":"id","value":"<id>"} (or {"mode":"name","value":"processed_messages"}).
rowNotExists requires at least one filter condition (minRequiredFields=1).
matchType values: 'anyCondition' (OR) or 'allConditions' (AND). Use allConditions for the (account_id, provider_message_id) pair.
upsert 'columns' uses the resourceMapper field: mappingMode 'defineBelow' + value map. Match fields come from the same filters block.
